title: Record: Legal Score-First TTT + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 1.1220 (3-seed mean)
body:
## Record: Legal TTT + Parallel Muon + Parameter Banking — val_bpb 1.1220

**val_bpb = 1.1220** (legal score-first TTT, 3-seed mean, std 0.0003) | **~15.9 MB** | 8×H100 SXM

### 3-Seed Results (8×H100 80GB SXM, PyTorch 2.9.1+cu128)

| Seed | step_avg | steps | Pre-TTT bpb | **Post-TTT bpb** | TTT gain | TTT eval time | Artifact |
|------|----------|-------|-------------|-----------------|----------|---------------|----------|
| 1337 | 82.3ms | 7,278 | 1.1236 | **1.1217** | -0.0019 | 400s | 15,972,608 |
| 42 | 82.4ms | 7,265 | 1.1242 | **1.1222** | -0.0020 | 406s | 15,851,192 |
| 2025 | 82.4ms | 7,276 | 1.1240 | **1.1221** | -0.0019 | 401s | 15,856,092 |
| **Mean** | **82.3ms** | **7,273** | **1.1239** | **1.1220 (std 0.0003)** | **-0.0019** | **~400s** | |

### Timing Budget

| Phase | Time |
|-------|------|
| Training | 600s (≤10 min on 8×H100) |
| Standard eval | ~120s |
| Legal TTT eval | ~400s |
| **Total** | **~1120s** |

Training completes in 600s. TTT runs during the evaluation phase — same phase as other TTT submissions (#398, #442, #461).

### TTT Legality

This uses **backward-looking, score-first TTT** (PR #461's framework):

1. Val tokens split into 1,893 non-overlapping 32K chunks
2. **For each chunk**:
   - **SCORE**: sliding window eval under `torch.inference_mode()` — no gradients, no weight mutation
   - **TRAIN**: SGD on the already-scored chunk (3 epochs, freeze blocks 0-1, cosine LR, grad clip 1.0)
3. **Last chunk is scored but never trained on**
4. Chunk N is scored by a model adapted only on chunks 0..N-1

`inference_mode()` is a PyTorch context manager that disables gradient tracking and prohibits in-place weight mutation. This guarantees every token is scored before any update that could use it.

### Training Optimizations

Parameter Banking and Parallel Muon, first introduced in our [PR #399](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/399):

1. **Parameter Banking** — 4 contiguous 3D `nn.Parameter` banks replace 66 separate `nn.Linear` weights. Enables batched Newton-Schulz via `torch.bmm`.
2. **Parallel Muon** ([arXiv:2511.07464](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.07464)) — DDP removed for banks. Async reduce-scatter → local NS → async all-gather. 82.3ms/step vs ~85ms baseline.

Applied to #414's stack: GPTQ-lite, VE128, Tight SWA, Partial RoPE, LN Scale, XSA4.

### Credits

- **Optimizer (Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon)**: [PR #399](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/399) by @abaybektursun
- **TTT recipe**: [PR #461](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/461) by @anantdgoel
- **Base model**: [PR #414](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/414) by @signalrush

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

comments.body: parameter banking is smart, batching the ns ortho steps like that is clean. curious about the legal ttt protocol too, scoring before updating makes way more sense than what most people been doing
